title: clematis zeylanica
intro: Clematis zeylanica, also known as the Traveller's Joy or Clematis paniculata, is a perennial climbing plant native to Asia and Australia, known for its fragrant white flowers and edible parts. Traditionally, the plant has been used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Clematis zeylanica include reducing fever, relieving headaches, and treating respiratory issues. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
